---
id: list-grid-points
title: "List grid points for an index"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List grid points for an index"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/indexes/{name}/gridpoints"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all grid point definitions for the named market index.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
